full_dragon_menu.title: Cook and eat 4 different dragon-based dishes from End's Delight (unlocked via Dragon Egg Research)

subtitle.text: The Dragon Egg Research mechanic unlocks the full End's Delight recipe tree. Cook from that tree.

description: CH.14 · DRAGON CUISINE
▸ End's Delight is the dragon food mod.
Its full recipe tree unlocks via the Dragon Egg Research mechanic.
Once researched, every dragon-based dish becomes craftable.
The dishes use dragon materials you have already been farming:
Dragon Breath, Dragon Meat, Popped Chorus Fruit, Ender Pearl.
◈ END'S DELIGHT RECIPE CHAIN
└ Raw Ender Dragon Meat: drops from Ender Dragon on kill
(re-summon farming yields more each run)
└ Cooked Dragon Meat: furnace/smoker 1:1
High saturation, combat buff food
└ Dragon Steak: Cooked Meat + additional End materials
(check JEI under ends_delight: after Dragon Egg Research)
└ Dragon Breath uses: End's Delight multi-step cooking
Some recipes require Dragon Breath as a flavor catalyst
└ Popped Chorus Fruit: binding ingredient in several dishes
◈ STAT VALUE OF DRAGON FOODS
└ Dragon-tier foods: some of the highest saturation in the pack
└ Combat-facing buffs: strength/resistance for boss fights
└ Stack multiple dishes before Ch15-17 boss encounters
(buffed meals persist through combat — pre-eat before fights)
└ Diet mod integration: dragon foods count toward protein group
(this helps balance Diet if other protein sources are scarce)
◈ WHAT DRAGON EGG RESEARCH UNLOCKS
└ Interacting with the Dragon Egg in End's Delight
opens a research window or grants a recipe book
└ Full tree: all dragon-based cooking recipes
└ The Egg is consumed OR returned — check JEI/mod behavior
If consumed: farm the re-summon Dragon for another egg
(re-summon Dragon does NOT drop a second egg — this is false;
Dragon Egg is one-per-world — research uses it non-destructively)
▸ Senshi (Dungeon Meshi) would approve.
You did not just kill the dragon.
You identified the cuts. You sourced the ingredients.
You built a farm for the side dishes.
You researched the egg before cooking anything else.
You did the whole meal.
That is the correct approach.
▶ Cook and eat 4 dragon dishes (End's Delight) [check]
▶ Collect 4 Cooked Ender Dragon Meat
◇ End's Delight vs Ender's Delight: different mods.
End's Delight = dragon cuisine (ends_delight: namespace).
Ender's Delight = enderman/shulker food (endersdelight: namespace).
Both are in the pack. Both have separate recipe trees.
The complete End food system requires both.
